summary: Verified critical bug fix: Trader's ads now correctly appear in 'My Ads' management page. The fix addresses 1) Frontend filter removed that showed only active offers, 2) Backend data normalization for offers collection, 3) OfferResponse schema made resilient to missing fields. All tests pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified. Key validations: 1) GET /api/offers/my returns ALL offers (4 total: 1 active, 3 inactive), 2) GET /api/public/offers returns ONLY active offers (3 total), 3) Frontend TraderOffers.jsx displays all offers with proper status badges (Активно/Закрыто), 4) Inactive offers have dimmed opacity-60 styling, 5) All required fields (trader_login, payment_methods, is_active) are properly normalized.
